response.justification: Excellent match: Staff-level engineer with 10+ years experience exceeds seniority requirement, with direct expertise across the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) currently in use. Current role explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development, directly matching a key job requirement. Demonstrated full-stack capability from microservices at scale (millions of requests/second) to modern frontend work, plus proven software craftsmanship culture. Minor gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js or testing framework mentions, which are readily learnable for this caliber.
strengths: Seniority and scale experience far exceed role requirement (Staff-level, built systems handling millions of requests/second)
Direct, current expertise in core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React actively used at re:cinq)
AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—exact match for stated technical requirement
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite Node.js mastery across multiple roles
Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly detailed despite strong TDD culture demonstrated
Recent experience weighted toward MongoDB; limited explicit relational database emphasis despite SQL/MySQL listed in skills
